$comment: Phaser 3 asset index for the Sprout Lands UI pack (by Cup Nooble). 16x16-based pixel-art UI: nine-slice dialog/button panels, icon grids, emojis, a pixel font, weather icons and mouse cursors. Paths relative to `basePath`. Frame sizes marked with a $note were inferred and should be confirmed in an editor.

meta.author: Cup Nooble
meta.license: Non-commercial (Free Basic). No NFT/AI use. Do not redistribute/resell. Buy Premium for commercial use.

config.nineSliceTip: Panels below are 16px-tiled. For a 3x3 panel use Phaser's this.add.nineslice(x,y,key, frame, w, h, leftW, rightW, topH, bottomH) with 16px borders, or slice manually (see phaser-gamedev references/spritesheets-nineslice.md).

pixelFont_sproutLands_ttf.description: Sprout Lands pixel TrueType font. Load via CSS @font-face (or WebFontLoader) BEFORE creating the game, then use in this.add.text with fontFamily and disable antialias for crispness.
pixelFont_sproutLands_ttf.$note: Phaser bitmap-text needs a .fnt; none ships here. Use this ttf as a web font for this.add.text, or generate a bitmap font from the PNG below.

pixelLetters_png.description: The font rendered as a glyph atlas image (8x14 letters). Pair with a generated .fnt to use as a Phaser BitmapText.

dialog.$comment: Speech/dialog boxes. 'dialog box.png' is a 3x3 nine-slice bubble (48x48, 16px tiles) with a tail. small/medium/big are pre-sized single panels. 'Premade' versions include a ready background.

dialog_box_nineslice.description: Speech bubble panel (48x48). Use as a 16px-border nine-slice to scale to any size. Has a small tail on the lower-left.

premade_dialog_small.file: Sprite sheets/Dialouge UI/Premade dialog box small.png

premade_dialog_medium.file: Sprite sheets/Dialouge UI/Premade dialog box medium.png

premade_dialog_big.file: Sprite sheets/Dialouge UI/Premade dialog box  big.png

talk_continue_indicator.file: Sprite sheets/Dialouge UI/dialog box character finished talking click to continue indicator - spritesheet .png
talk_continue_indicator.description: 'Click to continue' blinking indicator shown when a character finishes talking.

emotes_teemo.file: Sprite sheets/Dialouge UI/Emotes/Teemo Basic emote animations sprite sheet.png
emotes_teemo.description: Over-head emote animations (each row is one emote's frames).
emotes_teemo.$note: 16px grid assumed (10x30). Each row = one animated emote; identify loops per row before use.

small_square.description: Small square buttons: 2 color styles (columns) x 8 states/icons (rows), 16x16 each.

square_19x26.description: Portrait buttons (~19x26 art). Sheet holds up/pressed states + variants.
square_19x26.$note: Frame grid approximate; the '19x26' in the name is the button ART size inside a padded cell. Verify cell size (candidates 32x32 or 32x24).

square_26x19.$note: Frame grid approximate; verify cell size.

square_26x26.$note: Frame grid approximate; verify cell size.

big_play_button.description: Large Play button, up + pressed states.
big_play_button.$note: Assumed 2 states of 96x64; could be 3x64. Verify.

settings_buttons.description: Settings menu buttons/toggles (sliders, checkboxes, icon buttons).
settings_buttons.$note: 16px grid assumed (8x15). Some controls span multiple tiles.

all_icons.description: Master icon set (16x16): numbers, symbols, hearts, coins, stars, tools, arrows, checks/crosses, etc.

emoji_spritesheet.description: Free emoji set, 16x16 each (10 columns x 38 rows).

speech_bubble_grey.$note: 16px grid assumed; may be a set of nine-sliceable bubbles - inspect groupings before use.

inventory.$comment: 'emoji style ui' inventory system. *_Spritesheet files are the reusable building blocks; *_example* files are pre-composed reference screenshots (load as image if you want the ready-made look).

inventory_blocks.description: Inventory slot / panel building blocks (borders, corners, slot fills) for nine-slicing inventory grids.
inventory_blocks.$note: 16px grid assumed; these tile together into inventory panels.

hearts.description: Heart / health bar states + fill animation (dark theme).

weather_icons_small.description: Small weather icons (sun, rain, cloud, etc.).

cursors.$comment: 16x16 mouse cursor sprites. Load as images; set as HTML cursor or draw a follower sprite.

catpaw_pointing.file: Sprite sheets/Mouse sprites/Catpaw pointing Mouse icon.png

catpaw_holding.file: Sprite sheets/Mouse sprites/Catpaw holding Mouse icon.png

basic_pack_ui_atlas.file: Sprite sheets/Sprite sheet for Basic Pack.png
basic_pack_ui_atlas.description: Master UI atlas combining many UI elements from this pack (896x240).
basic_pack_ui_atlas.$note: 16px grid assumed; a catch-all sheet - prefer the individual sheets above where possible.
